name: lifeos-saas
description: Based on the original SRS and upgraded to a production-grade SaaS architecture.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c cyan,green "npm run dev --workspace @lifeos/web" "npm run dev --workspace @lifeos/api"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @lifeos/web && npm run build --workspace @lifeos/api
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @lifeos/web && npm run lint --workspace @lifeos/api
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @lifeos/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @lifeos/api
